# @representative/ui-design-system

Presentational React component package for reusable enterprise UI primitives.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @representative/ui-design-system
Version: 1.0.0
Component: ui
Type: library
System: representative-enterprise-react
Domain: experience
Bounded context: design-system
Owner: team-ui
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: platform
Class: active.platform
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-ui
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Own reusable presentational React components
- Expose stable design-system primitives through public exports
- Provide accessibility and visual behaviour contracts

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not fetch GraphQL data
- Does not own feature workflows
- Does not import domain, adapter, or application packages

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Import from app and feature packages for presentational composition
- Use Storybook-style examples or local fixtures for documentation only

application
feature
test
```

### Forbidden consumers

graphql-adapter
domain-policy
runtime-fetch
```
